name: Appraisal Result
query:
SELECT
    employee.emp_id,
    employee.emp_name,
    employee.bu,
    bu_app.final_score,
    de_app.final_score,
    em_app.final_score,
    bu_app.final_score + de_app.final_score + em_app.final_score
FROM `tabEmployee` employee
LEFT JOIN `tabDepartment Appraisal` de_app
    ON employee.bu = de_app.bu
LEFT JOIN `tabBU Appraisal` bu_app
    ON employee.bu = bu_app.bu
    AND bu_app.period = de_app.period
    AND bu_app.appraisal = de_app.appraisal
LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee Appraisal` em_app
    ON employee.emp_id = em_app.emp_id
    AND em_app.period = de_app.period
    AND em_app.appraisal = de_app.appraisal
WHERE de_app.docstatus = 1
  AND em_app.docstatus = 1
  AND bu_app.docstatus = 1
  AND em_app.appraisal = %(Appraisal)s
  AND em_app.period = %(Period)s
  AND employee.bu = %(BU)s
